Pieces that outlive seasons.

Shop Now

Our Story

Zoya Fashion House is a Dubai based brand redefining bridal and ready to wear fashion with bold, high quality designs. Founded by Rosina Manjy in 2018.

The brand draws inspiration from culture, modern femininity, and everyday strength.From Dubai to Lisbon and Luanda, Zoya brings a fresh voice to contemporary fashion.

Why Zoya?

Perfect Fit

Effortless Luxury

Exclusive Designs

For Every Moment

It starts with a flick of the wrist...

Where Imagination Meets Precision

From the first sketch to the final fitting, our designs are crafted to transform not just your look, but how you feel confident, empowered, and unmistakably you.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

CanI return or exchange my purchase?

Yes, you can return or exchange your purchase within 10 days of receiving it,
provided the item is unused and in its original package.

Are all outfits ready to ship or made to order?

All our outfits are readymade and are designed to offer a perfect fit as per standard sizing.

Do you offer Cash on Delivery?

Yes, we offer COD for select locations. COD will be shown in checkout based on your
delivery area.

Do you offer International Shipping?

No, currently we don’t ship internationally. We only deliver within the UAE. We are
working on expanding our shipping options soon.

What They Say About Us

Zoya has become my go to label for clients and for myself. As a stylist, I’m always
searching for garments that tell a story and Zoys collection speaks volumes.
From stitching to fabric to flow, every detail feels intentional and luxurious.
It’s rare to find ready-made outfits that carry this level of refinement.

Diya Sana

Fashion Stylist

I discovered Zoya through a friend and decided to order something for an intimate
launch party. I was honestly blown away. The fabric quality, the way it hugged
in the right places and the effortless elegance of the design made me feel so
confident. I received compliments the entire night.

AyeshaMirza

Entrepreneur

I usually struggle to find ready-to-wear pieces that feel both strong and feminine, but Zoya gets it right. I wore one of their tailored sets straight from a family event to client function and it felt just as appropriate in both settings.
The craftsmanship is excellent, and the fit was like it was made for me. Zoya is
exactly what I’ve been looking for. Effortless, graceful and powerful fashion
house.

Cynthia Parker

Lawyer

As someone who works in design, I naturally gravitate towards brands that understand balance, proportion and mood. Zoya hits all those notes. There’s a quiet
confidence in their pieces that I love. Its fashion that doesn’t scream, but
still turns heads. I had to wait a bit for restocks, the quality and the
aesthetic have made it worth it every time. Can’t wait to see what they release
next.

Frezzy D’souza

Interior Designer

About Us

ZOYA FASHION HOUSE breaks the mold with daring, one of a kind designs that make luxury wearable for real life. We craft clothes that turn heads and spark confidence where every stitch screams individuality. Read More
